name: Dawar Ali
bio: DevOps Engineer with 6+ years automating and optimizing AWS workloads. I design scalable infrastructure, robust CI/CD, and secure cloud platforms.
about: DevOps Engineer with over 6 years of experience automating and optimizing mission‑critical deployments in AWS. Proficient with CI/CD (Jenkins, GitHub), containers (Docker, Kubernetes), and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation). I integrate security into delivery, improve reliability, and collaborate across teams to ship with confidence.

education.school: Islamic University Of Science and Technology

highlights: Managed and maintained AWS infrastructure; operated Kubernetes for secure, scalable microservices environments
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitHub Actions
Managed Google Workspace and Slack administration
Integrated security tooling into SDLC for compliance readiness (DPDP)
Managed Cloudflare WAF and incident response processes
Implemented observability with Loki to ensure high availability
Coordinated vendor relations and streamlined operations
Maintained in‑house servers including Cloud VPN for reliable operations
Implemented LDAP with Google services and integrated with Cloud VPN and OS auth
Optimized infra with HAProxy, DNS, DHCP, Apache, Nginx
Migrated VPN server to AWS improving uptime and security
Automated manual tasks with Bash scripting
Directed and monitored installed systems and infrastructure for performance
Maintained high levels of system uptime

projects.name: AWS Platform Hardening
projects.description: Hardened AWS accounts and workloads with IAM least‑privilege, CloudTrail/Config, and WAF protections; codified with Terraform.

projects.name: Kubernetes CI/CD with Jenkins
projects.description: Multi‑env pipelines building Docker images, security scanning, and progressive deploys to EKS with Helm.

projects.name: Observability with Loki
projects.description: Centralized logs with Loki and dashboards for SLOs, improving MTTR and incident response.
